chapter_title.en: Chapter on What Has Been Reported Regarding Adultery

text: 4979 - وَ قَالَ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ: "مَا عَجَّتِ اَلْأَرْضُ إِلَى رَبِّهَا عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ كَعَجِيجِهَا مِنْ ثَلاَثٍ مِنْ دَمٍ حَرَامٍ يُسْفَكُ عَلَيْهَا أَوِ اِغْتِسَالٍ مِنْ زِنًى أَوِ اَلنَّوْمِ عَلَيْهَا قَبْلَ طُلُوعِ اَلشَّمْسِ".

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications: Hadith.4979 - Imam (as) said: "The earth has never cried out to its Lord (azj), the Mighty and Majestic, as intensely as it does because of three things: the shedding of unlawful blood upon it, bathing after engaging in unlawful sexual relations, and sleeping on it (earth) before the rising of the sun."
